tier_2.description: Tier-2 region with moderate infrastructure resiliency and mid-mile uncertainty.
tier_2.infrastructure_quality: National-highway connectivity with partial expressway access.
tier_2.last_mile_profile: Decent last-mile performance with moderate suburban delivery variability.

tier_3.description: Tier-3 region with higher last-mile vulnerability and lower infrastructure redundancy.
tier_3.infrastructure_quality: State-highway and district-road dependency with limited redundancy.
tier_3.last_mile_profile: High last-mile delay probability and lower warehousing depth.

sez.description: SEZ corridor with stronger infrastructure, customs readiness, and lower disruption exposure.
sez.infrastructure_quality: Dedicated industrial infrastructure with better customs/process readiness.
sez.last_mile_profile: Stable internal last-mile movement with controlled gate operations.
